legal_description.value: Lot 46, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180.

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Models the Shea Homes new-construction sale of Lot 46 to its first owner. This is the first instrument in which Lot 46 appears as a distinct platted parcel — prior instruments in this chain describe the parent tract. Builder-to-homebuyer conveyance is typically a special warranty deed in Arizona. The Roberts family is a fabricated first buyer; no real conveyance of this lot by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

vesting.value: husband and wife as joint tenants with right of survivorship

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only instrument reconstructing Shea Homes's first-sale of Lot 46 to the original post-plat homeowner. Same-day-grouped with synthetic DOT 20020100002 (purchase financing). No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
